74493.subject: Weekly Recap: Tokenized SpaceX Stock Went Live  —unevenly
74493.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

[SpaceX opened for tokenized trading Friday](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/spacex-opens-for-public-trading-friday-with-a-live-crypto-tokenized-equity-stack) with Ondo's SPCXon, a Backpack-issued SPCX on Solana, and Hyperliquid's pre-IPO perpetual all running cleanly. The centralized side broke: [Bybit, Binance, and Bitget canceled their tokenized SpaceX allocations after xStocks failed to source underlying shares](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-binance-bitget-cancel-tokenized-spacex-allocations-xstocks-fails-deliver-shares).

Capital continued to flow into the institutional narrative: Digital Asset closed a $355 million round led by a16z crypto for its institutional Canton Network, and Morpho raised $175 million in one of DeFi's largest-ever funding rounds.

Also this week: Hester Peirce closed out nearly 30 years at the SEC, the[ last eight as the commission's most consistent crypto dissenter](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/the-long-road-of-hester-peirce).

Enjoy!

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c08bd1c9-c3dc-4e20-b131-4704a0da0fca/image.png)
Caption: 

Nexo is a digital wealth platform offering crypto yield up to 15% and crypto-backed credit lines from 1.9%. **[Join and get 30-day access to exclusive rates](https://nexo.com/defiant2)**. Terms apply.

———————————————————————————

———————————————————————————

# Top Stories This Week

## SpaceX Opens for Public Trading Friday With a Live Crypto Tokenized-Equity Stack Behind It

**SpaceX** [opened for public trading on Nasdaq under ticker SPCX](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/spacex-opens-for-public-trading-friday-with-a-live-crypto-tokenized-equity-stack) with multiple crypto venues carrying tokenized assets on the same name. The on-chain rolled-out smoothly, including: Ondo's SPCXon, a Backpack’s SPCX on Solana, and Hyperliquid's pre-IPO perp. The exchange-distributed side broke; [Bybit, Binance and Bitget canceled their tokenized-SpaceX campaigns after xStocks could not source underlying shares](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-binance-bitget-cancel-tokenized-spacex-allocations-xstocks-fails-deliver-shares).

## Mastercard Opens Card Rails to AI Agents With 30-Plus Crypto Partners

**Mastercard** [launched Agent Pay for Machines (AP4M)](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-agent-pay-machines-ap4m-ai-agents-crypto-partners), extending [its card network to autonomous AI agents](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-opens-card-settlement-network-on-eight-blockchains-adding-weekend-and-holiday-cycles) with 31 launch partners including Coinbase, [RippleX (named the same morning as an agentic-commerce partner)](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-xrpl-ai-starter-kit-mastercard-agent-pay-machines), Solana Foundation, Polygon, Aave Labs, and Stellar

74489.subject: The world’s wealthy are migrating like never before
74489.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDZ9AAcAAAAAAqiZMD1k6EhrxVilckr1_RDr90f4421r-1z_poskhIUbTmeiykDtlUqidesvE5ReqibPWSvQ9TBRFSAYe9qUVBpxqg0Cpx0AZTsrOmv3ENk 

June 13th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDZ9AAcAAAAAAqiZMD1lbcHpOvuuP7IDNtH1kI8KCNV-QUVVayVEgUriC9NkW2ITPCVPuIi5jd4e9veIf7B_rSv01zLubp49_uPxBWnyK6Pp6YpdbEsMB8I 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDZ9AAcAAAAAAqiZMD1maCL2q_TS_y_kTrVSxq15pNA46KR2_mR8UAMABcaWZEvxADvSQRGpm4O5KBFAkmu1OwT-pUUW7MYQ5RH0XbqFwP-MfVmrPfEDU_8 



 
 
Anna Kerr

Senior audience editor



 Geopolitical uncertainty has triggered a migration pattern you might not expect: wealthy Westerners are 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDZ9AAcAAAAAAqiZMD1nES-zUOAyPwtpCmYBrVT1j6MmF4Nl5fVwUFJ6bHBWKcPL5r9nf2WSWX6zvAxx-ZoXJaLikTfxb-XcejkernaZQZHQZoo0pA 
fleeing their home countries  
 in record numbers. America and Europe are losing their millionaires, who are keen to escape the threat of wealth taxes and shifting political headwinds. Dry your eyes, though, because plenty of governments remain eager to take in foreigners with money and skills—and a growing industry of trusted advisers stands ready to help them relocate.


 We report on another demographic shift this week: America’s 
 
https://click.e.economist

74486.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 13
74486.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-13-cryptobeholder-qtbgf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BJhBh7jeFQBOETx9A62d%2BzA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=18TYpy8whU1Ik1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqckfjk8~16-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqckfjk8-16
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: The ECB raised rates for the first time since 2023 while Bitcoin miner margins hit near-capitulation levels — tightening crypto’s macro vise from two directions. The CLARITY Act’s Senate path is now blocked by a standoff between law enforcement and developers that will define US crypto’s near future. 🏦 ECB Raises Rates for the First Time Since 2023 The European Central Bank raised interest rates for the first time since 2023, becoming the first G7 central bank to hike since the Iran conflict ignited an energy-driven inflation surge across the eurozone. ECB policymaker Peter Kazimir confirmed the bank’s intention to continue tightening if inflation does not show clear signs of retreat. Read full story ⛏️ Bitcoin Miner Capitulation Signals as Margins Fall Below 5% Bitcoin miner profitability has compressed to a critical threshold, with margins sitting below 5% as the network prepares for one of its 11th largest downward difficulty adjustments in history. CoinTelegraph reports that onchain data is showing classic capitulation patterns — hashrate selling and miner wallet outflows — that have historically preceded significant price dislocations. One prominent trader expects the true bear-market bottom to arrive later in 2026 rather than imminently, suggesting an extended consolidation may be ahead before any durable recovery takes hold. More details 📜 CLARITY Act Hits Senate Wall in Law Enforcement vs. Developer Standoff The CLARITY Act — the most consequential piece of US crypto legislation in years — faces a potential Senate floor blockade after a White House meeting between law enforcement groups and the crypto industry failed to resolve a critical provision. The nearly 90-minute meeting drew approximately 20 attendees and centered on developer liability protections drawn from the Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act, which law enforcement agencies oppose. See details 📺 LG Electronics Builds Blockchain Ad Platform on Arbitrum L2 South Korean tech giant LG Electronics has partnered with Arbitrum to build a custom Layer 2 network for a blockchain-based advertising platform set to launch this year. The platform is designed to combat ad fraud — a problem that Google’s own 2025 transparency report showed required blocking 8.3 billion ads and suspending nearly 25 million advertiser accounts, with
